User.title: User
User.description: A user of the voting system (voter or admin).

uid.description: The unique ID of the user.

email.description: The email address of the user.

name.description: The full name of the user.

nationalId.description: The national ID of the voter.

districtId.description: The ID of the electoral district the voter belongs to.

hasVoted.description: Whether the user has already cast a vote.

createdAt.description: When the user account was created.

id.description: The unique ID of the election.

status.description: The current status of the election.

id.description: The unique ID of the candidate.

electionId.description: The ID of the election the candidate is in.

districtId.description: The ID of the district the candidate is running in.

party.description: The party the candidate belongs to.

image.description: The URL of the candidate's image.

votes.description: The number of votes the candidate has received.

id.description: The unique ID of the district.

electionId.description: The ID of the election the district belongs to.

voterCount.description: The total number of registered voters in the district.

Party.title: Party
Party.description: A political party in an election.

id.description: The unique ID of the party.

logo.description: The URL of the party's logo.

votes.description: The number of votes the party has received.

LocalList.title: LocalList
LocalList.description: A local list in an election.

id.description: The unique ID of the local list.

name.description: The name of the local list.

districtId.description: The ID of the district the local list belongs to.

votes.description: The number of votes the local list has received.

id.description: The unique ID of the vote (transaction hash).

candidateId.description: The ID of the candidate voted for.

districtId.description: The ID of the district where the vote was cast.

/elections/{electionId}/local_lists/{lis.description: Local lists for a specific election.
